results.rendered_html:
ramaṇī
1 A lovely young woman, latā ramyā seyaṃ bhramarakularamyā na ramaṇī  Bv. 2. 90. 
2 A wife, mistress; bhogaḥ ko ramaṇīṃ vinā  Subhāṣ. 
3 A woman in general.
4 The aloe tree.
